---
title: "Computing for the Social Sciences"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    theme: cosmo
---

### Course Assignments Fall 2025

<div class="my-4"></div>

Assessment for this course consists of four take-home assignments, one take-home final project, and two in-class exams.

The **four homework assignments** and the **final project** will be posted here once they are released:

- [Homework 1](hw01.qmd)
- [Homework 2](hw02.qmd)
- [Homework 3](hw03.qmd)
- [Homework 4](hw04.qmd)
- [Final Project](hw05-project.qmd)

The **two exams** will include a mix of multiple-choice and open-ended questions. They will be held in class and will be closed-book. More details will be shared during class.

**Further info:**

- Check our [Course Schedule](../lectures/index.qmd) for release and due dates of all assignments.

- Refer to the [Syllabus](../syllabus.qmd) for assessment policies, including guidelines on late or missing submissions, grading rubric, AI policies, and more.
